title: Shared sealed pattern dictionary — Field Memory host DRAM + GPU VRAM
motto: One sealed dictionary for both memory planes — more field memory when patterns repeat; refuse tamper

security.pack_bind: DIC1 frames store generation + seal[0..15]; unpack refuses mismatch
security.train_sources: regular files only; refuse S_IWOTH (world-writable inject)
security.no_ambient_train: train only via spear dict-train (operator intent)

capacity.mechanism: longest-match substitution of repeated byte patterns (8–64 B)
capacity.shared: host DRAM fieldmem + GPU VRAM fieldmem use the same loaded dict
capacity.measured: pack_ratio on frames with kind=DICT; never fake ×N
